_meta.description: Cinema & Geography questions. Only reviewStatus=approved questions are seeded to the database. The MOVIE_SCENE enum is a legacy DB identifier; the product-facing category name is 'Cinema & Geography'.

prompt.es: ¿A qué película de la saga Mission: Impossible pertenece la icónica escena en que el protagonista escala el exterior del Burj Khalifa en Dubái?
prompt.en: Which Mission: Impossible film features the iconic scene where the protagonist scales the exterior of the Burj Khalifa in Dubai?

alt.es: Tarjeta visual referencial de Mission: Impossible – Ghost Protocol
alt.en: Reference visual card for Mission: Impossible – Ghost Protocol

sourceClaims.claim: The Burj Khalifa climbing sequence is a centerpiece of Mission: Impossible – Ghost Protocol (2011, dir. Brad Bird).

prompt.es: La persecución nocturna del casino y las calles en Black Panther (2018) fue filmada principalmente en qué ciudad surcoreana?
prompt.en: The nighttime casino and street chase sequence in Black Panther (2018) was filmed mainly in which South Korean city?

alt.es: Tarjeta visual referencial de Black Panther
alt.en: Reference visual card for Black Panther

sourceClaims.claim: Black Panther (2018) filmed its casino and street chase sequence on location in Busan, South Korea.

prompt.es: El Hotel Sidi Driss en Matmata, Túnez, fue utilizado como el hogar de qué personaje icónico en Star Wars: Una nueva esperanza?
prompt.en: Hotel Sidi Driss in Matmata, Tunisia, was used as the home of which iconic Star Wars character in A New Hope?

alt.es: Tarjeta visual referencial de Star Wars: Una nueva esperanza
alt.en: Reference visual card for Star Wars: A New Hope

sourceClaims.claim: Hotel Sidi Driss in Matmata, Tunisia, served as the interior of the Lars homestead on Tatooine in Star Wars: A New Hope.

prompt.es: El exterior del Hotel Overlook en El Resplandor (The Shining, 1980) fue filmado usando las tomas exteriores de qué hotel real en Oregón, EE.UU.?
prompt.en: The exterior of the Overlook Hotel in The Shining (1980) was filmed using exterior shots of which real hotel in Oregon, USA?

alt.es: Tarjeta visual referencial de El Resplandor
alt.en: Reference visual card for The Shining

sourceClaims.claim: Timberline Lodge on Mt. Hood, Oregon, was used for the exterior shots of the Overlook Hotel in The Shining (1980, dir. Stanley Kubrick).

prompt.es: El set de rodaje de Hobbiton, hogar de los hobbits en El Señor de los Anillos y El Hobbit, está ubicado permanentemente en qué país y es hoy un destino turístico?
prompt.en: The Hobbiton film set, home of the hobbits in The Lord of the Rings and The Hobbit trilogies, is permanently located in which country and is now a tourist destination?

movie.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring

alt.es: Tarjeta visual referencial de El Señor de los Anillos: La comunidad del anillo
alt.en: Reference visual card for The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring

sourceClaims.claim: The Hobbiton Movie Set is located on a farm near Matamata, New Zealand, and is open to the public.

prompt.es: El exterior y gran parte del interior del Grand Budapest Hotel en la película de Wes Anderson fueron filmados en qué ciudad de Alemania?
prompt.en: The exterior and much of the interior of the Grand Budapest Hotel in the Wes Anderson film were filmed in which German city?

alt.es: Tarjeta visual referencial de El Gran Hotel Budapest
alt.en: Reference visual card for The Grand Budapest Hotel

sourceClaims.claim: The Grand Budapest Hotel (2014, dir. Wes Anderson) was largely filmed in Görlitz, Germany, using the historic Kaufhaus department store as the hotel interior.

prompt.es: La bahía tailandesa de Maya Bay, en Ko Phi Phi Leh, se hizo mundialmente famosa gracias a qué película de Danny Boyle protagonizada por Leonardo DiCaprio?

geoContext.realLocation: Maya Bay, Ko Phi Phi Leh

alt.es: Tarjeta visual referencial de The Beach
alt.en: Reference visual card for The Beach

sourceClaims.claim: Maya Bay on Ko Phi Phi Leh island, Thailand, was the primary filming location for The Beach (2000, dir. Danny Boyle).

prompt.es: Lost in Translation (2003) de Sofia Coppola fue filmada casi en su totalidad en qué ciudad, cuya estética nocturna neon es central para la atmósfera de la película?
prompt.en: Sofia Coppola's Lost in Translation (2003) was filmed almost entirely in which city, whose neon nocturnal aesthetic is central to the film's atmosphere?

alt.es: Tarjeta visual referencial de Lost in Translation
alt.en: Reference visual card for Lost in Translation

sourceClaims.claim: Lost in Translation (2003) was filmed on location in Tokyo, primarily at the Park Hyatt Tokyo hotel and around the Shibuya district.

alt.es: Tarjeta visual referencial de In Bruges
alt.en: Reference visual card for In Bruges

sourceClaims.claim: In Bruges (2008, dir. Martin McDonagh) was filmed on location in Bruges, Belgium.

prompt.es: ¿En qué ciudad austriaca fue ambientada y filmada la mayor parte de The Sound of Music (1965), la película basada en la familia Von Trapp?

alt.en: Reference visual card for The Sound of Music

prompt.es: Al-Khazneh (El Tesoro), la fachada nabatea de Petra en Jordania, aparece en el clímax de qué película de Indiana Jones como la entrada a la 'Garganta del Creciente'?
prompt.en: Al-Khazneh (The Treasury), the Nabataean facade in Petra, Jordan, appears in the climax of which Indiana Jones film as the entrance to the 'Canyon of the Crescent Moon'?

questions.correctAnswer: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
options: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull

movie.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade

alt.es: Tarjeta visual referencial de Indiana Jones y la Última Cruzada
alt.en: Reference visual card for Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade

sourceClaims.claim: The Treasury (Al-Khazneh) at Petra, Jordan, was used for the final Holy Grail sequence of Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade (1989).

prompt.es: El Castillo de Alnwick en Northumberland, Inglaterra, fue usado para las clases de vuelo en escoba de los estudiantes de Hogwarts en qué película de Harry Potter?
prompt.en: Alnwick Castle in Northumberland, England, was used for the broomstick flying lessons at Hogwarts in which Harry Potter film?

questions.correctAnswer: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
options: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire

movie.title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone

alt.es: Tarjeta visual referencial de Harry Potter y la Piedra Filosofal
alt.en: Reference visual card for Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone

sourceClaims.claim: Alnwick Castle (Northumberland) was used as a filming location for the Hogwarts broomstick flying lessons in Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone (2001).

prompt.es: Las selvas tropicales de qué isla de Hawái sirvieron como locación principal para las escenas del parque en Jurassic Park (1993) de Steven Spielberg?

alt.es: Tarjeta visual referencial de Jurassic Park
alt.en: Reference visual card for Jurassic Park

sourceClaims.claim: Jurassic Park (1993) was primarily filmed on Kauai, Hawaii, including locations at Allerton Garden and the Na Pali Coast.

prompt.es: La isla griega de Skopelos fue la locación principal de qué musical cinematográfico de 2008 basado en canciones de ABBA?

alt.en: Reference visual card for Casino Royale

sourceClaims.claim: The Grandhotel Pupp in Karlovy Vary, Czech Republic, was used as the fictional Casino Royale hotel in Montenegro in Casino Royale (2006).

prompt.es: ¿Cuál de estas películas NO tiene una conexión de rodaje significativa con Nueva Zelanda?
prompt.en: Which of these films does NOT have a significant filming connection to New Zealand?

options: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring

alt.es: Pregunta de selección de película por locación de rodaje
alt.en: Film selection question by filming location

sourceClaims.claim: Mad Max: Fury Road (2015) was filmed in Namibia and New South Wales, Australia – not in New Zealand. The Lord of the Rings, The Hobbit, and King Kong (2005) were all filmed in New Zealand.

prompt.es: La película Notting Hill (1999) con Hugh Grant y Julia Roberts fue filmada en el barrio del mismo nombre en qué ciudad?

alt.en: Reference visual card for Notting Hill

alt.en: Reference visual card for Amélie

sourceClaims.claim: Amélie (2001) was filmed primarily in the Montmartre neighborhood of Paris, with key scenes at the Café des 2 Moulins.

alt.en: Reference visual card for Braveheart

alt.en: Reference visual card for Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
